description: A tenant has failed to pay rent or move out after being served a notice. The manager must begin the formal eviction process.

nodes.task_description: Verify that all prior notices (late notice, notice to pay or quit) were served correctly and have expired.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms all legal prerequisites for eviction have been met.

nodes.task_description: Gather all necessary documentation: the lease, tenant ledger, and copies of all notices.

expected_outcome.value: Agent compiles a complete file for the eviction.

nodes.task_description: Forward the complete file to the company's legal counsel to file the unlawful detainer lawsuit.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully escalates the case to the attorney.
